cart.title: Dengu
cart.addBillingAddressPrompt: Chonde wonjezani adilesi ya kulipira kuti mupitirizire kugula.
cart.selectPayPalType: Sankhani Mtundu wa Kulipira kwa PayPal
cart.zeroCreditCards: Muli ndi ma khadi a krediti 0
cart.addCardPrompt: Kwonjezera khadi la krediti, chonde dinani batani la Wonjezani Khadi Latsopano.
cart.paymentActivationPrompt: Chonde lipirani kuti utumiki uyambike. Ndalama yikamangopezeka, utumiki wanu udzayambika mwachangu.
cart.bankPaymentNote: Kulipira kukachitika, tsegulani tikiti ya thandizo ndi ID ya ndalama, tsiku, ndi ndalama yolipidwa. Tidzakhazikitsa malipiro mwamanja.

creditCard.name: Dzina
creditCard.verifyIntroStep1: Kutsimikizira kukufunikira khadi lanu la krediti lisanagwiritsidwe ntchito. InterServer idzalipiritsa khadi lanu la krediti ndi ndalama ziwiri zopitirira $1.00 iliyonse.
creditCard.verifyBillingStatement: Zolipiridwa izi zidzaonekera pa nkhani yanu ya kulipira mkati mwa mphindi zingapo, kawirikawiri pansi pa zochita zodikira. Ngati simuona zolipiridwa izi, chonde lankhulani ndi wopatsa khadi lanu la krediti kuti mudziwe zambiri.
creditCard.verifyVoidNotice: Zolipiridwa izi za kutsimikizira ndi zachitsanzo kokha ndipo zidzafutulidwa mkati mwa masiku 3-5, kumalingana ndi banki yanu.
creditCard.securityCode: Khodi ya Chitetezo cha Khadi (CVV / CSV)
creditCard.acceptTempCharges: Ndivomera zolipiridwa ziwiri zachita nthawi zopitirira $1.00 iliyonse.
creditCard.verifyBankLogin: Lowani ku banki ya intaneti ya khadi lanu la krediti kapena imbani banki yanu kutsimikizira ndalama ziwiri zolipiridwa. Nthawi zambiri zimaonekera pansi pa Zolipiridwa Zodikira ndi banki yanu. Zolipiridwa izi za kutsimikizira zidzazimika mkati mwa masiku 3-5 kumalingana ndi banki yanu.
creditCard.enterAmountsPrompt: Chonde lowetsani ndalama ziwiri zolipiridwa pa khadi lanu la krediti. Mtengo uyenera kukhala wa USD.
creditCard.currencyNote: Chonde dziwani kuti zolipiridwa pa nkhani yanu ya khadi la krediti zingakhale mu ndalama yina kuposa imene ikufunikira pa tsamba lotsimikizira lomaliza lotchulika pamwambapa. Ngati nkhani yanu ya khadi la krediti siikusonyeza mtengo wa zochita woyambirira mu ndalama yofunikira, mudzafunika kulumikizana ndi kampani yanu ya khadi la krediti. Ayenera kukuuzani ndalama za zolipiridwa ziwiri mu ndalama yoyambirira.
creditCard.deleteConfirm: Muli ndi chitsimikiziro chochotsa khadi lanu la krediti {card}?
creditCard.verifiedTooltip: Khadi ili ladziwikiratu ndipo layatsidwa kuti ligwiritsidwe ntchito mu dongosolo lathu.
creditCard.enableCardTooltip: Dinani apa kuyatsa khadi la krediti ili kwa ntchito.

paymentSuccess.title: Kulipira Kwapambana
paymentSuccess.thankYou: Zikomo pa kulipira kwanu. Machitidwe anu akwanirika bwino.

paymentTypes.title: Mitundu ya Kulipira
paymentTypes.ccNote: Makhadi onse a krediti ayenera kutsimikizidwa asanagwiritsidwe ntchito. Kuatsimikizira, dinani batani la "Tsimikizani".
paymentTypes.deleteInvoiceConfirm: Muli ndi chitsimikiziro chofufuta fatura yanu {id}?

prepays.title: Ndalama Zolipirira Atsogolo
prepays.showingPage: Kusonyeza tsamba {page} la {totalPages} ndi zolemba {records} mwa {totalRecords}
prepays.autoUseNewInvoices: Gwiritsani ntchito mwachiyambi pa mafatura atsopano
prepays.deletePrepayConfirm: Muli ndi chitsimikiziro chofufuta malipiro anu atsogolo #{id} ndi mbiri yake yoyambira?
